judgements.reason: Reasoning (Google $40B / Amazon $25B / Microsoft $13B+ as compute-as-equity precondition; multi-runtime to multi-frontier-vendor consequence; Q3 2026 landing) holds. May 1-3 bridges (Pentagon 8-vendor deal locking AWS/Microsoft/Google, OpenAI on Bedrock, Anthropic-Trainium native Opus 4.7) all reinforce the structural force. Landing target Q3 2026 still future.

Seven bridges Apr 27 - May 3 mostly support the prediction with rel=1 to rel=5 across because/given/so_that dimensions. The May 1 rel=1 dim=given correctly notes the OpenAI/Microsoft Apr 27 reset shifted exclusivity but did not break the multi-frontier-vendor lock-in thesis. No contradict signals.

Three Needs (hyperscaler frontier-lab capacity contracting, frontier-model serving topology, enterprise multi-cloud strategist) all status=open. Compute-as-equity term sheets visible across Google/Anthropic and AWS/Anthropic but procurement playbooks at the enterprise side haven't yet shifted publicly.

Eight chain edges and six relations created May 5 cohere with the prediction's hyperscaler-lab capital coupling shape. The entails relation to af6de8a (5-pole alliance regime) and parallel to 81d3055 (three-cloud training oligopoly) are consistent reinforcements; no upstream contradicted; no equivalent relations to transfer evidence from.
